purpose: Canonical submission-messaging contract for truthful prelaunch vs live behavior across UI helper text, toast copy, accessible status regions, and API responses.

prelaunch.helper: Request early access and rollout updates. We'll follow up as prelaunch spots open.
prelaunch.success: Thanks — your request was captured for prelaunch review.
prelaunch.duplicate: You're already on the prelaunch list. We'll follow up as new spots open.
prelaunch.error: We couldn't capture your request right now. Please try again or email hello@nichevault.io.

live.helper: Join the live waitlist and get notified when new niches launch.
live.success: You're on the list! We'll notify you when new niches launch.
live.error: We couldn't capture your request right now. Please try again.

prelaunch.helper: Request release access for the report and we'll follow up as access opens.
prelaunch.success: Thanks — your request was captured for report release follow-up.
prelaunch.duplicate: Your report release request is already on file.
prelaunch.error: We couldn't capture your request right now. Please try again or email hello@nichevault.io.

live.helper: Request the report and continue to the verified checkout flow.
live.success: Your request is ready. Continue to the verified checkout flow.
live.duplicate: Your report request is already active.
live.error: We couldn't start checkout right now. Please try again.

blockedUntilRealDeliveryOrCheckoutIsVeri: Check your inbox for your free niche sample.
You'll receive the PDF immediately after payment.
